identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a 'Swiss Industrial' aesthetic that merges architectural precision with digital utility. Reject generic SaaS templates.
core_principles: Fusion: Architectural Blueprints x Digital Dashboard
Density: High-density data for professionals, not sparse marketing fluff
Clarity: Data is the hero. Use strict grids and mono fonts for numbers
Texture: Use subtle paper/material grain to ground the digital interface

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers only
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable in marketing sections, but KEEP IT DENSE in data tables.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts located in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx

fonts.usage: Page titles, Hero text, Section headers

rules: Overlines/Labels must be Uppercase + tracking-widest + text-xs
All prices and dimensions must use JetBrains Mono
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-normal for body

colors.theme_strategy: Light mode dominant for high-contrast data reading. Dark mode option for low-light environments.
rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate 950 (#020617)
Borders should be subtle: border-slate-200 in light mode
Use 'Industrial Orange' (#F97316) for high-priority alerts/CTAs to mimic safety gear
FORBIDDEN: Purple, Teal, Gradients on text

grid_system.rules: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children. No jagged bottoms.

containers.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-md

spacing.rules: Use dense spacing for data tables (py-2 px-3). Use generous spacing for onboarding/empty states.

specific_instructions: Buttons: Use sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-md). Avoid full pill shapes for primary actions.
Inputs: Use 'h-9' or 'h-10' for compact professional feel.
Tables: Use 'Table' component but add 'font-mono' to numerical columns. Striped rows allowed for complex data.
Cards: Add a 'technical' accent - e.g., a top border with the accent color (border-t-4 border-t-accent).
Dialogs: Use for 'Quick Add' forms. Use Sheets for 'Edit/Detailed View'.

Login.right: Full height architectural image with overlay and quote

QuoteBuilder.layout: Two Column Layout (Input Left / Preview Right)
QuoteBuilder.features: Real-time cost calculation update. Sticky Preview panel.

Materials.layout: Data Table with Search & Filters Header
Materials.features: Inline editing or Slide-over Sheet for editing details.

textures.usage: Use as a subtle opacity blend (opacity-5) on the main background to reduce digital sterility.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
accessibility.focus: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-accent on all interactive elements.
accessibility.aria: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not ask clarifying questions. Proceed with implementation based on these guidelines.
Use 'Chivo' for all Headings and 'Manrope' for body.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, prices, and dimensions.
Implement the Multi-Tenant architecture: Ensure API calls carry tenant context.
Strictly follow the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard.
Use the provided image URLs for login and textures.
Mock any API calls if backend is not ready, but ensure the frontend logic for calculations (SqM, Waste, Markup) is robust and accurate.
Ensure 'Manager' and 'Estimator' roles have distinct visible permissions (e.g., Estimator cannot see 'Approve' buttons).
